title: Greece: Gunman opens fire at social security office and courthouse; police hunt 89-year-old suspect
summary_full: An 89-year-old man armed with a shotgun wounded an employee at a social security office in Athens before opening fire at a courthouse, injuring several more people. Police are actively searching for the suspect, with the motive behind the attacks currently unknown.
